name: Ask User

manifest.title: Ask User
manifest.author: ichrist
manifest.description: Allows the LLM to autonomously trigger 1-5 interactive pop-up questions to gather missing project details.

specs.name: ask_user
specs.description:
Ask the user 1–5 questions sequentially, each in its own popup dialog.
All answers are collected and returned as a single structured string.

questions.description: List of 1–5 question strings, shown in order.
